name: Starbucks® Rewards Visa® Card

earning_rates.notes: 1 Star per $1 when loading Starbucks Card via Starbucks mobile app with the Visa
2 Stars per $1 paid directly with the Starbucks Rewards Visa Card at Starbucks
1 Star per $2 spent at grocery stores
1 Star per $2 spent on local transit and commuting
1 Star per $2 spent on internet, cable and phone services
1 Star per $4 spent on all other purchases

notes: DISCONTINUED: Stopped accepting new applications mid-2022; fully discontinued July 2023. Existing cardholders were migrated to Chase Freedom cards. No new applications accepted. Earning rates were Stars-based (Starbucks loyalty currency). No longer in production.
